name: clone-loop
description: Clone Loop keeps coding agents working with confidence-gated predicted next prompts from Clone MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Agent working with predicted next prompts.
interface.longDescription: Clone Loop connects agents to Clone MCP so iterative coding sessions can continue with contextual, confidence-gated next-prompt predictions.
defaultPrompt: Predict the next prompt for this coding session.
Help me keep this task moving until tests pass.
Use Clone MCP context to suggest the next step.
